CREATE TABLE test_messages (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, message VARCHAR);

INSERT INTO test_messages (id, message) VALUES (1, 'From: "Demo User" user@demo.com
Subject: Test 1
Newsgroups: openlink.public.test

TEST MESSAGE 1.

.
');

INSERT INTO test_messages (id, message) VALUES (2, 'From: "Demo User" user@demo.com
Subject: Test 2 - with special chars! @#&*()
Newsgroups: openlink.public.test

TEST MESSAGE 2.

.
');

INSERT INTO test_messages (id, message) VALUES (3, 'From: "Demo User" user@demo.com
Subject: Test 3
Newsgroups: openlink.public.test

This is a longer test message to check the system capabilities.

.
');

INSERT INTO test_messages (id, message) VALUES (4, 'From: "Demo User" user@demo.com
Subject: Test with line breaks
Newsgroups: openlink.public.test

Line 1
Line 2
Line 3
.
');

INSERT INTO test_messages (id, message) VALUES (5, 'From: "Demo User" user@demo.com
Subject: Boundary Test
Newsgroups: openlink.public.test

A message that contains exactly 1000 characters of content................................... (and repeats until 1000 characters are achieved)

.
');
SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', (SELECT message FROM test_messages WHERE id = 1));
SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', (SELECT message FROM test_messages WHERE id = 2));
SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', (SELECT message FROM test_messages WHERE id = 3));
SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', (SELECT message FROM test_messages WHERE id = 4));
SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', (SELECT message FROM test_messages WHERE id = 5));

SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', CONCAT('From: "Demo User" user@demo.com
', (SELECT message FROM test_messages WHERE id = 1), '
Extra Footer Info
.
'));

SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', FORMATTED(CONCAT('From: "Demo User" user@demo.com
Subject: ', (SELECT message FROM test_messages WHERE id = 2), '
.
')));
SELECT nntp_post('news.openlinksw.co.uk:119', (SELECT message FROM test_messages WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_messages)));
